summary: Iteration 32: Complete validation of Settings.js and Touchpoints.js refactoring. Settings page (1563→92 lines) with 7 tabs all render correctly. Touchpoints page (1181→320 lines) with 5 tabs all render correctly. Architecture ↔ Valuation integration verified - Brand Valuation fetches and displays data from Brand Architecture.
passed_tests: Settings: White Label tab (tab-white-label) renders correctly
Settings Security: Current password input (current-password-input) present
Settings Security: New password input (new-password-input) present
Settings Security: Confirm password input (confirm-password-input) present
Settings Brands: New brand button (new-brand-settings-btn) present
Settings Brands: Brand name input (brand-form-name) present
Settings Team: Invite email input (invite-email-input) present
Settings Team: Send invite button (send-invite-btn) present
Settings Personalization: Push notification toggle (push-notification-toggle) present
Touchpoints: ROI & Financial tab (tab-financial) renders correctly
Touchpoints: AI Analysis tab (tab-ai) renders correctly
Touchpoints Form: Funnel phase select (fase-funil-select) present
Brand Valuation page loads with data-testid='brand-valuation-page'
Brand Valuation: Architecture Integration Card (arch-integration-card) displays data from Brand Architecture
Brand Valuation: Shows arch_type (Monolitica), products count (1), ticket_medio (R$ 2500)
Brand Valuation: Step navigation with 4 steps present
Brand Valuation: Financial form fields (val-marca, val-setor, val-receita, val-ebitda, val-divida) present
Brand Valuation: RBI questions (5) with score buttons present
Brand Valuation: BS factors (10) with score buttons present
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.js refactored from 1563 to 92 lines - clean shell component with tab navigation
SettingsProfile.js: Avatar upload, profile form with name/email/phone/location/bio fields
SettingsSecurity.js: Password change form with current/new/confirm fields and validation
SettingsBrands.js: Brand CRUD with name, industry, type, color, logo upload, parent brand selection
SettingsTeam.js: Team members list, invite form with 7 RBAC roles (lider_projeto, editor, colaborador, visualizador, cliente_admin, aprovador, convidado)
SettingsPersonalization.js: Theme toggle (light/dark/system), notification switches, push notification toggle
Touchpoints.js refactored from 1181 to 320 lines - clean shell with sub-components
TouchpointForm.js: Create/edit dialog with all fields (name, environment, funnel phase, sentiment, score, financial)
TouchpointOverview.js: Stats cards, heatmap, top critical/excellent lists
TouchpointOffline.js: Offline touchpoints management with type-specific guidance
BrandValuation.js: Architecture integration working - fetches and displays arch_type, products, ticket_medio from Brand Architecture API
All data-testid attributes preserved after refactoring

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Settings, Touchpoints, and Valuation features working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 validated the refactoring of Settings.js (1563→92 lines) and Touchpoints.js (1181→320 lines). Key findings: 1) Settings page has 7 tabs (Profile, Security, Brands, Team, White Label, Integrations, Personalization) - all render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. 2) Touchpoints page has 5 tabs (Overview, Offline, Funnel, ROI & Financial, AI Analysis) - all render correctly. 3) TouchpointForm dialog has all required fields. 4) Architecture ↔ Valuation integration works - Brand Valuation page fetches and displays arch_type, products count, and ticket_medio from Brand Architecture API. 5) All backend APIs working correctly. NO MOCKED APIs - all endpoints are real.
notes: The refactoring was successful - both Settings.js and Touchpoints.js are now clean shell components that delegate to sub-components. All existing functionality preserved. The Architecture ↔ Valuation integration is working correctly with the arch-integration-card showing data from Brand Architecture.
